title: grok-install agent manifest v2.14
description: Canonical schema for grok-install agent manifests at version 2.14. Backward-compat policy per DECISIONS.md D5: unknown top-level keys and unknown `extensions:` sub-keys are accepted by conformant parsers.

version.description: Spec version. Locked to '2.14' per DECISIONS.md D5.

name.description: Agent slug. Lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens, 2-63 chars, must start with a letter or digit.

engine.description: Runtime engine. v1.0 ships with the `grok` engine only.

model.description: Model identifier passed to the engine (e.g. 'grok-3', 'grok-4').

targets.description: Deployment runtime targets: `action` runs as a GitHub Actions workflow step; `ide` runs interactively in the VSCode extension; `worker` runs as a Cloudflare Worker serverless runtime; `web` runs as a browser-resident static HTML page.

inputs.description: JSON-Schema-shape describing the agent's input contract.

outputs.description: JSON-Schema-shape describing the agent's output contract.

tools.description: Tool references this agent depends on.

extensions.description: Optional extension blocks per DECISIONS.md D5. Unknown sub-keys are accepted (forward-compat).

constitution.description: References to constitution rule files (constitution-scanner integration).

multi_agent_roles.description: Role declarations for super-agents that coordinate multiple sub-agents.

demo_metadata.description: Video / storyboard URLs and demo metadata for catalog listings.

x_money_specific.description: Cost caps and tax disclaimer config for X Money / finance templates.
